rules.to: My name is 2B, I am the Android supporter of Minecraft Boss Arena. The commands you might need are !arena start, to start the Minigame and !wave start to start the next wave after every wave you slayed. If you do not want to be disturbed by the weather, type !weather clear.

name: function 5

rules.to: /execute store result score DarkMiking mobCount if entity @e[type=!player,type=!item,type=!arrow,type=!snowball,type=!egg,type=!trident,type=!fireball,distance=..40]

rules.to: give @a netherite_sword[custom_name=[{"text":"T","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"},{"text":"w","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"},{"text":"i","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"},{"text":"l","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"},{"text":"ig","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"},{"text":"ht","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"},{"text":" ","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"},{"text":"E","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"},{"text":"d","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"},{"text":"g","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"},{"text":"e","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"}],lore=[[{"text":"Forged in the dying light of a fading sun, ","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"},{"text":"The Twilight's Edge","bold":true,"italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"},{"text":" is a blade whispered about in legends and feared by those who dwell in darkness. It is said that this sword was crafted by an ancient order of twilight guardians, warriors sworn to protect the fragile balance between day and night.","italic":false,"color":"dark_purple"}]],rarity=epic,enchantments={fire_aspect:2,sharpness:5,smite:2,sweeping_edge:3,unbreaking:3}]
